name: Organic Fuji Apples 1kg
text: Organic Fuji apples 1kg, crisp and sweet, NSW grown. Great for school lunchboxes and snacking. Naturally low GI, no added sugar, vegan, gluten-free.

name: Cavendish Bananas 1kg
text: Cavendish bananas 1kg, ripe and ready to eat. Australian grown in Far North Queensland. Excellent source of potassium and natural energy. Perfect for breakfast smoothies, baking, or kids snacks.

name: Hass Avocados Each
text: Hass avocados, ripe and ready. Creamy texture, ideal for smashed avo on toast, salads, guacamole, or healthy fats in lunch wraps. Australian grown.

name: Baby Spinach 120g
text: Pre-washed baby spinach leaves 120g. Tender, mild flavour. Use in salads, smoothies, pasta, omelettes. High in iron, folate and vitamin K. Vegan and gluten-free.

name: Cherry Tomatoes 250g Punnet
text: Sweet cherry tomatoes 250g punnet, vine-ripened in Australia. Perfect for salads, pasta, kids snacks, lunchboxes. No added preservatives.

name: Carrots 1kg
text: Loose carrots 1kg, fresh from Australian farms. Versatile root vegetable for roasting, soups, stews, school lunchbox sticks with hummus. High in beta-carotene.

name: Free-range Whole Chicken 1.6kg
text: Free-range whole chicken 1.6kg, RSPCA approved. Australian raised. Ideal for Sunday roast, slow cooker meals, batch cooking shredded chicken for the week.

name: Beef Mince 5-Star 500g
text: Premium 5-star beef mince 500g, lean and grass-fed Australian beef. Perfect for spaghetti bolognese, burgers, tacos, lasagne, meatballs. High protein, no added preservatives.

name: Atlantic Salmon Fillet 250g
text: Skin-on Atlantic salmon fillet 250g, Tasmanian farmed. Rich in omega-3. Pan-fry, oven-bake, or grill. Pairs with greens, rice, or pasta. Family-friendly fish for weeknight dinners.

name: Pork Sausages 6 pack
text: Traditional pork sausages 6 pack, Australian made. BBQ favourite, also good for casseroles, sausage rolls, kid-friendly dinners with mash and peas.

name: Full Cream Milk 2L
text: Full cream Australian dairy milk 2L. Versatile pantry staple for breakfast cereal, coffee, baking, smoothies. Pasteurised, no added preservatives.

name: Greek Style Yoghurt 1kg
text: Greek-style natural yoghurt 1kg, thick and creamy. High protein, probiotic. Use as breakfast with fruit and granola, in smoothies, as sour cream substitute, or in baking.

name: Tasty Cheese Block 500g
text: Tasty cheddar cheese block 500g, Australian made. Sharp flavour. Slice for sandwiches, grate for pasta, melt on toast, kids cheese and crackers.

name: Free-range Eggs 12 pack
text: Free-range eggs 12 pack, RSPCA approved Australian farms. High protein breakfast staple. Use in omelettes, scrambles, baking, frittatas, fried rice.

name: Oat Milk Unsweetened 1L
text: Unsweetened oat milk 1L, dairy-free, vegan, plant-based milk alternative. Lactose-free. Great for coffee, cereal, smoothies. Low fat, no added sugar.

name: Wholemeal Sandwich Bread 700g
text: Wholemeal sliced sandwich bread 700g, high fibre, no artificial colours or flavours. Perfect for school lunchbox sandwiches, toast, breakfast.

name: Sourdough Loaf 600g
text: Artisan sourdough loaf 600g, slow-fermented. Crusty exterior, chewy interior. Excellent toasted with avocado, alongside soup, or for premium sandwiches.

name: Gluten-Free White Bread 470g
text: Gluten-free white sandwich bread 470g, suitable for coeliac and gluten intolerance. Soft texture, freezer-friendly. Toast for best results.

name: Spaghetti Pasta 500g
text: Durum wheat spaghetti 500g, Italian style. Pantry staple for quick weeknight dinners — bolognese, carbonara, aglio e olio, tuna pasta.

name: Basmati Rice 1kg
text: Long-grain basmati rice 1kg, fragrant and fluffy. Pairs with curries, stir-fries, biryanis. Gluten-free, vegan.

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil 750ml
text: Australian extra virgin olive oil 750ml, cold-pressed. Use for salad dressings, drizzling, low-heat cooking, marinades. Heart-healthy fats.

name: Diced Tomatoes Tin 400g
text: Italian diced tomatoes in juice 400g tin. Pantry essential for pasta sauces, curries, soups, stews, chilli, shakshuka.

name: Chickpeas Tin 400g
text: Chickpeas in brine 400g tin. Vegan, vegetarian, high protein, high fibre. Use in salads, curries, hummus, roasted snacks, buddha bowls.

name: Rolled Oats 1kg
text: Wholegrain rolled oats 1kg, Australian grown. Heart-healthy breakfast porridge, overnight oats, muesli, baking, smoothies. Low GI, high fibre.

name: Mixed Nuts Roasted Unsalted 400g
text: Roasted unsalted mixed nuts 400g — almonds, cashews, walnuts. Healthy snack, lunchbox topper, salad crunch. High protein, plant-based, keto-friendly.

name: Dark Chocolate 70% 100g
text: Premium 70% cocoa dark chocolate 100g block. Lower sugar than milk chocolate. Vegan, antioxidant-rich. Treat or baking ingredient.

name: Sultanas 375g
text: Australian sultanas 375g, naturally sweet dried fruit. Lunchbox snack, baking, muesli, scones, kid-friendly. No added sugar.

name: Frozen Mixed Berries 500g
text: Frozen mixed berries 500g — strawberries, blueberries, raspberries. Use in smoothies, porridge, yoghurt, baking, breakfast bowls. Antioxidant-rich, naturally sweet.

name: Frozen Peas 1kg
text: Frozen garden peas 1kg, Australian grown. Quick side dish, fried rice, pasta, soups, kids' veggie option. Vegan, gluten-free.

name: Loose Leaf Lettuce Each
text: Fresh loose leaf lettuce, Australian grown hydroponic. Crisp leaves for salads, sandwich filler, burger topper, lettuce wraps.

name: Broccoli Each
text: Fresh broccoli head, Australian grown. Steam, roast, or stir-fry. Great side for Sunday roast, weeknight stir-fries, or kids' veggie plates. High in vitamin C and fibre.

name: Red Capsicum Each
text: Red capsicum, Queensland grown. Sweet and crunchy. Perfect for stir-fries, fajitas, roasted veggies, salads, kids snack sticks with hummus. High in vitamin C.

name: Button Mushrooms 400g
text: Fresh button mushrooms 400g, Australian grown. Ideal for risotto, pasta sauce, breakfast fry-ups, stir-fries, pizza topping. Low calorie, vegan.

name: Sweet Potato 1kg
text: Sweet potato 1kg, Australian grown. Roast for Sunday dinner, mash, bake as wedges, or use in curries and soups. Naturally sweet, low GI, high fibre.

name: Brown Onions 1kg
text: Brown onions 1kg, Australian grown. Kitchen staple for soffritto, curries, soups, stews, roasts, caramelised onion jams. Versatile base for almost any savoury dish.

name: Garlic Bulbs 3 pack
text: Fresh garlic bulbs 3 pack, Australian grown. Essential aromatic for pasta, stir-fries, marinades, roasts, garlic bread. Adds depth to almost any savoury cooking.

name: Lemons 4 pack
text: Fresh lemons 4 pack, NSW grown. Use juice and zest in baking, dressings, marinades, drinks, fish dishes. High in vitamin C. Brightens any flavour.

name: Long Life Milk 1L
text: Long-life UHT full cream milk 1L, Australian dairy. Pantry staple, no refrigeration needed until opened. Great for camping, emergency stock, coffee, cereal.

name: Sparkling Mineral Water 1.25L
text: Australian sparkling mineral water 1.25L, naturally carbonated. Refreshing and calorie-free. Mix with cordial, serve with meals, or use as a soft drink alternative.

name: Raspberry Cordial 1L
text: Raspberry fruit cordial 1L, Australian made. Dilute with water or sparkling water for a refreshing drink. Kids party favourite, summer entertaining staple.

name: Instant Coffee 200g
text: Premium freeze-dried instant coffee 200g jar. Smooth and rich. Quick morning coffee, office staple, camping essential. Just add hot water or milk.

name: English Breakfast Tea 100 bags
text: English Breakfast tea 100 bags, classic black tea blend. Strong and full-bodied. Perfect with milk and a biscuit. Pantry essential for any household.

name: Dishwashing Liquid 900ml
text: Lemon-scented dishwashing liquid 900ml, tough on grease. Australian made. Cuts through baked-on food, gentle on hands. Kitchen sink essential.

name: Paper Towel 6 rolls
text: Absorbent paper towel 6 rolls, strong and quick. Kitchen spills, cleaning, drying produce, bacon grease blotting. Household staple.

name: Laundry Powder 2kg
text: Front and top loader laundry powder 2kg, fresh fragrance. Australian made. Lifts stains, brightens whites, gentle on fabrics. Approximately 25 washes.

name: Toilet Paper 12 pack
text: 3-ply soft toilet paper 12 rolls, Australian made. Strong, absorbent, gentle. Bulk-buy household essential. Sustainably sourced fibre.

name: Frozen Margherita Pizza 500g
text: Frozen Margherita pizza 500g, stone-baked thin crust with mozzarella and tomato. Quick weeknight dinner, ready in 12 minutes. Vegetarian.

name: Frozen Hash Browns 750g
text: Frozen hash browns 750g, golden and crispy. Oven-bake or pan-fry. Perfect for weekend brunch, big breakfasts, side with eggs and bacon.

name: Frozen Fish Fingers 425g
text: Crumbed frozen fish fingers 425g, MSC certified hoki. Oven-bake in 15 minutes. Kid-friendly weeknight dinner with chips and peas.

name: Sliced Leg Ham 200g
text: Sliced Australian leg ham 200g, mild flavour. Perfect for sandwiches, school lunchboxes, antipasto platters, ham and cheese toasties.

name: Hungarian Salami 150g
text: Sliced Hungarian salami 150g, smoky and spicy. Charcuterie board favourite, pizza topping, sandwich filler, antipasto platter.

name: Classic Hummus 200g
text: Creamy classic hummus 200g, made with chickpeas and tahini. Vegan, gluten-free. Dip with carrot sticks, spread on wraps, side for falafel bowls.

name: Kalamata Olives 200g
text: Pitted Kalamata olives 200g in brine. Greek style, rich and briny. Toss into salads, antipasto platters, pasta puttanesca, or serve with feta.

name: Butter Chicken Meal Kit 380g
text: Butter chicken meal kit 380g — sauce, spices, basmati rice. Add chicken and cook in 20 minutes. Mild Indian curry, family-friendly weeknight dinner.

name: Salmon Avocado Sushi Pack 8 piece
text: Salmon and avocado sushi pack 8 pieces, freshly made. Includes soy sauce and wasabi. Quick lunch, picnic, on-the-go meal. Pescatarian.

name: Vegetarian Lasagne 500g
text: Vegetarian ricotta and spinach lasagne 500g, oven-bake in 30 minutes. Hearty meat-free dinner. Pairs with green salad and garlic bread.

name: Soy Sauce 250ml
text: Naturally brewed soy sauce 250ml, Japanese style. Pantry essential for stir-fries, sushi dipping, marinades, fried rice, dumplings. Vegan.

name: Coconut Milk 400ml
text: Coconut milk 400ml tin, Thai style. Base for curries, laksa, rice puddings, smoothies, dahl. Rich and creamy. Vegan, gluten-free, dairy-free.

name: Tortilla Wraps 8 pack
text: Soft white tortilla wraps 8 pack, Mexican style. Use for burritos, fajitas, quesadillas, school lunchbox wraps, breakfast roll-ups.

name: Thai Red Curry Paste 195g
text: Thai red curry paste 195g jar, authentic blend of chillies, lemongrass, galangal. Combine with coconut milk and protein for a fragrant Thai curry.

name: Newborn Nappies 28 pack
text: Premium newborn nappies 28 pack, up to 5kg. Soft, absorbent, breathable. Wetness indicator. Australian made. Trusted overnight protection for babies.

name: Apple Pear Baby Food Pouch 120g
text: Apple and pear baby food pouch 120g, smooth puree. Suitable from 4 months. No added sugar, no preservatives. Convenient on-the-go feeding.

name: Multivitamin Tablets 60 pack
text: Daily multivitamin tablets 60 pack, men's and women's formula. Supports energy, immunity and general wellbeing. Two-month supply. Australian made.

name: Paracetamol 500mg 24 pack
text: Paracetamol 500mg tablets 24 pack. Temporary relief of headache, fever, body aches and pains. Household first aid kit essential.

name: Electrolyte Powder 10 sachets
text: Hydration electrolyte powder 10 sachets, citrus flavour. Replenish minerals after exercise, illness, or hot summer days. Low sugar, vegan.

name: Wholegrain Cereal 500g
text: Wholegrain breakfast cereal flakes 500g, Australian grown wheat. High fibre, low sugar. Pour with milk for a quick weekday breakfast. Family-friendly.

name: Smooth Peanut Butter 500g
text: Smooth peanut butter 500g, Australian made, no added sugar or salt. Spread on toast, smoothies, satay sauce, peanut noodles. High protein, vegan.

name: Australian Honey 500g
text: Pure Australian honey 500g, multi-floral. Drizzle on yoghurt, porridge, toast, or use in tea, baking, marinades. Natural sweetener, no additives.

name: Wholemeal Wraps 8 pack
text: Wholemeal wraps 8 pack, soft and pliable. Use for chicken caesar wraps, school lunchboxes, breakfast burritos, hummus and salad rolls. High fibre.

name: Muesli Bars 6 pack
text: Chewy muesli bars 6 pack, oats and honey. School lunchbox favourite, on-the-go snack, post-workout fuel. Source of fibre, no artificial colours.
